calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Trust
Off Calendar Dec-20-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrea Lego appeared via zoom (pro per).

Discussion was held regarding Timothy Lantzty's special needs trust, that Ms. Lego would like to sell the mother's vehicle and place the proceeds in the trust, that she is giving Mr. Lantzy his allowance thru the payments he receives, and that he is receiving foods stamps but needs to go to the G.A. office so he can get the proper care for his mental and physical health. The matter is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Lump Sum Payment
Off Calendar Dec-12-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Lump Sum Payment
Off Calendar Nov-07-2022 Continued To Dec-12-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Lump Sum Payment
Off Calendar Aug-29-2022 Continued To Nov-07-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrea Lego, via Zoom, in propria persona, Successor Trustee.

Ms. Lego provides the court with an update on Mr. Lantzy and advises that she is looking for options for assistance with Mr. Lantzy, such as contacting adult protective services, as her mother is dealing with health issues and accordingly has been unable to care for Mr. Lantzy. The court offers a suggestion of hiring a professional fiduciary in the Sacramento area to act as case manager and if that is an option, Ms. Lego should file an ex parte application for the appointment of a case manager.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Nov-07-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Trusteeship
Off Calendar Jan-24-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Trusteeship
Off Calendar Dec-20-2021 Continued To Jan-24-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance is made by any counsel, party, or interested person.

Noting no appearances but expressing concern that Andrea Lego, Trustee in pro per, may not have received notice of the present hearing continuance, the Court continues the matter to January 24, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204, the Court to give notice.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Dillingham. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Trusteeship
Off Calendar Dec-13-2021 Continued To Dec-20-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Proof Of Deposit Of $15,000 Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Aug-23-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrea Lego (Successor Trustee) appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

Appearances: Andrea Lego (Successor Trustee) appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

Ms. Lego stated that so far things are okay, that she was able to get through to the insurance company and get things changed over to her name, and that she thinks she is going to need an order on a monthly basis. Ms. Lego also stated that she thinks a monthly allowance for Timothy is a good idea, that he is older and has needs, and that Timothy is still living with her Mother. In addition, Ms. Lego stated that her Mother's health continues to decline, that she needs to go down there and figure out what needs to be done, and that at some point she may need to figure out housing for Timothy. The Court authorizes a $700.00 monthly allowance for Mr. Lantzy. The Court explained that it will go to Ms. Lego and then she will disburse it to Timothy. Ms. Lego stated that she will set up a separate account for Timothy and that she will disburse the funds twice a month. Proof of deposit into a blocked account is off calendar. Status of trusteeship is set for December 13, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status of lump sum payment is set for August 29, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Proof Of Deposit Of $15,000 Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jul-19-2021 Continued To Aug-23-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrea Lego, via ZOOM, for Evelyn Gayfield, Conservator.

The court begins by summarizing the previous hearing in this matter and requests an update. Ms. Lego reports that she made attempts to contact a professional fiduciary to act as trustee, but she has not received a reply. The court then confirms with Ms. Lego that she is willing to serve as Trustee until someone else can be appointed. The court then advises Ms. Lego that an order will be drafted to remove her mother, Ms. Gayfield, as trustee and appointing her in that capacity. The court also recommends that once Ms. Lego has a copy of the order appointed her as trustee, she either have the funds directly deposited into a blocked account or, that she arranges to have the checks mailed directly to her.

The Status on Filing Proof of Deposit into Blocked Account is continued to August 23, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: B. Quesada. Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Proof Of Deposit Of $15,000 Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jun-07-2021 Continued To Jul-19-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrea Lego, via ZOOM, in Propria Persona, Successor Trustee; Evelyn Gayfield; via telephone, in Propria Persona, Trustee.

At the outset, Ms. Lego reports that she believes that her mother, Ms. Gayfield, is no longer able to serve as the Trustee in this matter due to several health-related issues and accordingly, Mr. Lantzy appears to have full access to the funds being provided to him via the trust. Ms. Gayfield confirms that she has had a difficult time recently dealing with health-related issues but reports that Mr. Lantzy is doing well without her assistance. The court then queries Ms. Lego if she would be willing to serve as Successor Trustee, as outlined in the trust. Ms. Lego confirms that she would rather have the court appoint someone else to serve as Successor Trustee, if needed. The court then advises the parties that it is concerned that the funds from the trust are not being properly managed including submitting accountings. After additional discussion, the court advises the parties that it will be asking the investigator assigned to this matter to contact the parties to discuss the procedures to appoint a Successor Trustee.

The Status on Filing Proof, etc., is continued to July 19, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204. The Order to Show Cause is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Proof Of Deposit Of $15,000 Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar May-03-2021 Continued To Jun-07-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrea Lego, via ZOOM, in propria persona.

At the outset, the court queries Ms. Lego regarding her mother. Ms. Lego reports that in her opinion her mom is not in the position to continue to serve as Trustee due to health issues. The court then asks Ms. Lego if she might be amenable to serve in the same capacity. Ms. Lego reports that the Beneficiary may not be happy with her replacing her mother as Trustee and feels that it may be a better idea if the court appoints a professional instead. The court advises that pursuant to terms set forth within the Trust, Ms. Lego is named as the first successor Trustee and if she is not willing to serve, the last acting Trustee should designate a successor Trustee. After additional discussion, Ms. Lego reports that she is amenable to serve as successor Trustee, for now. The court considers the fact that she would be required to file a petition to do so. After additional consideration, the court believes that it may be more prudent to issue an Order to Show Cause to remove the current Trustee and appoint Ms. Lego as successor Trustee.

The court continues the Status Hearing on Filing Proof of Deposit of Lump Sum Payment to June 07, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204. The court will also set an Order to Show Cause RE removal of the current Trustee Ms. Gayfiled and appointing Andrea Lego as successor Trustee, for the same date and time of the above hearing. The Orders to Appear (2) are taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES
Off Calendar Sep-24-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Katherine Montgomery for and with Evelyn Gayfield (Trustee).

Ms. Montgomery advised the Court that Ms. Gayfield cannot get a bond and that the trust assets are in a blocked account, that she suggested to have all future payments deposited into the blocked account and that Ms. Gayfield will seek court approval to withdraw funds. The Court allowed the Trustee to act in pro per on her own behalf and granted attorney's fees. Status report on future schedule payment to be deposited in blocked account is set on August 25, 2014 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Ms. Montgomery to prepare an order.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Watts. (Not Reported)

The Court is also requiring bond in the amount of $57,000.00. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). Ms. Montgomery raised the issue of the possibility of her Client not qualifying for a bond.
